episodes.title: Bridgewater - Inside the Cult of Ray Dalio | Full Documentary
episodes.description:
Ray Dalio built Bridgewater into the largest hedge fund in history and sold the world a philosophy called Principles — radical transparency, idea meritocracy, truth above all. Behind the gospel was something stranger: a closed system of dot ratings, public trials, and ritual humiliation, run by a founder who demanded the obedience he claimed to despise. This is the story of the man, the machine, and the myth.
